documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 7 implements @tesseract/intervention: typed manager (pause/resume/abort/gotoStage), append-only JSONL FsInterventionStore plus an in-memory test double, journal-reduction helper for active state, and structural LangGraph-shaped helpers. Updates the feature task list.

deferred_items.rationale: tess pause | resume | abort CLI surfaces are deferred to Phase 3 step 8 (@tesseract/cli).
Real LangGraph runtime integration is intentionally not pulled in; this slice ships pure-data shapes for later wiring.
goto state currently mirrors resumed; finer-grained rules will be added once the graph runner consumes the journal.
LLM-judge README contract uses TBD-on-commit content hash and requires the runner panel; deferred to the contract runner pass.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the human gate at the phase boundary, and respects the no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule (only @tesseract/core).
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps intervention artifacts traceable and machine-checkable while limiting scope to the declared package boundary.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 intervention responsibilities and the US-10 MVP three-lever surface (pause/resume/abort) with goto reserved for later expansion.
